_note: Customer-facing 'What's new' feed shown on the login screen + admin Overview. Newest release FIRST. Keep items short, plain-language, benefit-led (no internal table/tool names). Bump VERSION file when you cut a release and add a block here.

releases.title: What's new, right on the version
items: Click the version on the sign-in screen to see what changed in the latest release.
Cleaner sign-in page — the old What's-new banner is gone.

releases.title: Widgets follow your Brand instantly
items: Set a theme once on the Brand page and every store widget updates live — colour, position and greeting, no re-deploy.
Widgets only keep their own look when you deliberately override a single store.
Fixed widgets showing the old navy default instead of your brand colour.

releases.title: Smarter stock answers
items: Catalog and stock no longer need to match 100% — the assistant now tells you 'in catalog, 0 on hand' vs 'we don't carry it'.
Clear 'Not Found' when an item exists in neither catalog nor stock.
Data-quality screen flags catalog gaps and orphan stock so you can fix the source files.

releases.title: Faster counter answers
items: Plain availability questions ('is X in stock?') answer in ~2s with no AI round-trip.
Richer analyst answer card — compact KPI tiles, show-SQL, evidence freshness.
Repeated questions served from a curated answer cache.

releases.title: Embed widgets + training visibility
items: Per-outlet embeddable chat widgets with one-click deploy zips.
Live training pipeline view on the dashboard.
Burmese + English replies that mirror the question language.
